title: KKR acquires majority stake in Haldiram's snacks business at $8.5B valuation
summary: Private equity giant KKR is set to acquire a majority stake in Haldiram's, India's leading snacks conglomerate, at an $8.5 billion valuation in the largest FMCG deal in India.
full_text: KKR acquires majority stake in Haldiram's snacks business at $8.5B valuation. Private equity giant KKR is set to acquire a majority stake in Haldiram's, India's leading snacks conglomerate, at an $8.5 billion valuation in the largest FMCG deal in India.

title: Pepsico acquires Siete Foods for $1.2B to expand into health snacks
summary: PepsiCo expands its better-for-you snack portfolio with a $1.2 billion acquisition of Siete Foods, a Mexican-American family brand known for grain-free tortilla chips.
